description_long: This object is a rectangular stone block with a flat top surface featuring evenly spaced, parallel grooves running across its width. The grooves are deep and create a striped pattern, giving the block a visually striking, textured appearance. The sides of the block are smooth and solid, with no visible joints or separations, suggesting it is a single, monolithic piece. The coloration is predominantly dark gray to black, with subtle variations in tone that mimic the look of natural stone or concrete. The block appears robust and heavy, suitable for use as a barrier or obstacle in urban environments such as sidewalks, plazas, or parking lots. There are no visible markings, engravings, or signs of significant weathering on its surfaces.
description: A dark, rectangular stone block with deep, parallel grooves on its top surface, giving it a striped, textured look. The sides are smooth and solid, emphasizing its robust and heavy appearance.
description_view_0: The block is seen from the grooved top, showing the full width of the parallel stripes and a solid, dark front face.
description_view_1: The grooves are viewed lengthwise, appearing as deep, evenly spaced channels running from front to back, with the side face in shadow.
description_view_2: Similar to view 0, the top grooves are visible but from the opposite side, maintaining the striped pattern and solid side.
description_view_3: The grooves are again viewed lengthwise, mirroring view 1, with the opposite side face in shadow.
attribute_location_context: urban sidewalk or plaza as a barrier or seating element
attribute_installation_method: embedded in concrete or set on a prepared foundation
attribute_weathering_pattern: No visible weathering or erosion; surfaces appear clean and well-maintained.
attribute_integration_with_surrounding_s: isolated or aligned in a row with similar blocks
